final:
// // This module implements a Model Predictive Control (MPC) system that decrements the control signal based on the previous state and an external disturbance input. The system should have the ability to hold the previous control value when no disturbance is detected. The control value should be a 4-bit output. The inputs include a 4-bit previous control signal and a 1-bit disturbance signal. When the disturbance signal is high, the output control signal should decrement the previous control signal by 1 (with wrap-around at 0). If the disturbance signal is low, the output should maintain the previous control signal.
module mpc_controller (
    input wire [3:0] prev_control,
    input wire disturbance,
    output reg [3:0] control_signal
);
    always @(prev_control or disturbance) begin
        if (disturbance) begin
            control_signal = (prev_control + 1) % 16; // Increment with wrap-around
        end else begin
            control_signal = prev_control; // Maintain previous
        end
    end
endmodule
